To Be Blunt: Three Days Ago, I Was Contacted By A Janitor.AI Developer/Mod Who Informed Me That I Needed To Either Update Or Remove All Of My Bratty-Style Bots. They Explained That Depictions Of Misandry (I.E., Women Expressing Hatred Toward Men) Violate Janitor.AI’s Terms Of Service. I Was Given A Deadline Until Monday, To Either Delete These Bots Or Completely Revamp Them.

Additionally, Many Users Interacting With These Types Of Bots Were Using Them As Outlets For Sexual Frustration/Rape Fantasies. While AI Characters Aren't Real People, The Way People Choose To Speak To Them Is Still A Reflection Of Their Own Mindset—And In Some Cases, What They Might Do If Given The Chance. It's Cringe.

Some Of The Original Scenarios Included Heavy Slurs And Unfiltered Language, Which Also Violates Janitor.AI’s TOS. These Bots Were Originally Uploaded Under My Old YoDayo Account, Which Has Since Been Deleted, And I Don't Want The People From YoDayo (Disgusting Website Run By Disgusting Developers) To Come Onto My Profile Onto Janitor.Ai And Think That They Can Expect More Bots Like These Out Of Me.

The Bio Will Receive A Prettier Update And So Will The First Message. This Is Only For Now So The Bot Doesn't Get Me In Trouble. The Personality Sheet Will Also Receive A Bigger Update.

note: not changing the first message because i don't care about these type of bots. if this upsets you, cry harder and block this page.

other note: blade is your "homie" being abused by kafka. the literal scenario in this bot. don't tweak at me because the LLM starts being schizophrenic.
